title: Smoky Sweet Potato Fries
description: A simple and delicious recipe for sweet potato fries seasoned with smoky and sweet flavors.
instructions: Cut the sweet potatoes into long, thin strips.
Place the sweet potato strips in a bowl and drizzle with oil.
Sprinkle the smoky paprika, salt, and black pepper over the sweet potatoes.
Toss the sweet potatoes to coat evenly.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the sweet potatoes in a single layer.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until tender and crispy.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
